answer: To become a TEP Citizen: 1) Post in the Citizenship thread with your WA nation in TEP, 2) Reply 'CONFIRM' to the telegram a Citizenship Official sends you, 3) Wait for the Office to accept. You must maintain that WA nation and residency.
Use the official Citizenship Application thread in 'Newcomers Start Here' on forum.theeastpacific.com. The Citizenship Office posts acceptances/denials there.
Citizenship becomes invalid 12 hours after you leave TEP or leave the WA on your recorded nation. Post in the thread and return within 12 hours to keep it【6575519359233843469†L69-L78】.
